nasb.text: He who tends the fig tree will eat its fruit, And he who cares for his master will be honored.

esv.text: Whoever tends a fig tree will eat its fruit, and he who guards his master will be honored.

cnv.text: 照料無花果樹的，必吃樹上的果子； 事奉主人的，必得尊榮。

ccb.text: 看无花果树的吃无花果， 照顾主人的也必得尊荣。

csbs.text: 看守无花果树的，必吃树上果实； 看护主人的，必得尊荣。
